entry.title: Collected information belongs to the topics of query execution and optimization in SAP HANA database
entry.content:
last updated: 2025-06-11

Introduction
There is huge knowledge available about SAP HANA query execution topic (incl. parsing / optimization / plans / engines / hints / etc.),  but the knowledge is very fragmented (Help Portal, Blog post, SAP KBA, SAP Note, SAP Learning, other). The aim of this article is simplify and make content consumption easier with a centralized page. There is no reason to duplicate the already well prepared content, so the goal is to collect the available knowledge and put it in a well structured format. The logic of the page follows the earlier published articles in the same series.

What is SAP HANA?

Table of Content (The internal links had been removed cause the new blogging platform only supports basic html, and the use of anchor links not supported.) 

  1. Definitions
  2. Where to find documentations in SAP Help Portal?
  3. Which are the master SAP Knowledge Base Articles?
  4. Which are the related SAP Knowledge Base Articles?
  5. Where to find learning materials?
  6. Concept of the SAP HANA query execution
  7. Which SAP HANA execution engines exist?
  8. Which SQL Statement Collection report can be used for monitoring query execution?
  9. Which other documents belongs to SAP HANA Execution Engine (HEX) and why is this particularly important?
  10. Which other documents belongs to hints?
  11. Which other documents belongs to plans?
  12. Other articles in this series
  13. Other articles in connected series
  14. Useful bookmark

Definitions
To put the topic in context we need to understand general terms and meanings correctly.

  • Query: A query is a question or inquiry about a set of data. We use Structured Query Language (SQL) to retrieve meaningful and relevant information from databases.
  • Query Compilation / "Query Preparation": The set of sequences to parse, check, optimize, and generate a plan is called query compilation.
  • Query Execution:  Query execution in a database involves a user submitting a query, which is then processed by the database engine to retrieve the requested data. This process includes several internal steps, such as parsing, optimization, and ultimately, the execution of a physical plan. 
  • Statement / Statement String / Statement Hash: 3588199 - Overview of the "statement string" / "statement hash" in the context of SAP HANA database?

IMPORTANT !
=================================================================

Where to find documentations in SAP Help Portal?

  • SAP HANA Performance Guide for Developers - SQL Process

Which are the master SAP Knowledge Base Articles?

  • 2124112 - FAQ: SAP HANA Parsing
  • 2000002 - FAQ: SAP HANA SQL Optimization

Which are the related SAP Knowledge Base Articles?

  • 2142945 - FAQ: SAP HANA Hints
  • 2400006 - FAQ: SAP HANA Statement Hints
  • 2570371 - FAQ: SAP HANA Execution Engine (HEX)
  • 2599949 - FAQ: SAP HANA Extended SQL Executor (ESX)

Where to find learning materials?

  • SAP Learning - A First Step Towards SAP HANA Query Optimization

=================================================================

Concept of the SAP HANA query execution
The below image shows the current SAP HANA query execution steps, logic in order. The following scenarios can occur:

  1. Plan cache entry not found
  2. Plan cache entry found

Image source:  SAP Learning - A First Step Towards SAP HANA Query Optimization

Which SAP HANA execution engines exist?

  • SAP HANA Performance Guide for Developers - Query Execution Engine Overview
  • 2000002 - FAQ: SAP HANA SQL Optimization - - > 37. Which SAP HANA execution engines exist?

Which SQL Statement Collection report can be used for monitoring query execution?

  • 1969700 - SQL Statement Collection for SAP HANA
  • 3327150 - SQL Statement Collection: "HANA_SQL_StatementHash_DataCollector" report for SAP HANA

Which other documents belongs to SAP HANA Execution Engine (HEX) and why is this particularly important?
HEX is a new SQL engine in HANA that is designed to replace other engines. The SQL optimizer in HANA prioritizes HEX plans over plans from old engines if the query can be executed by HEX. The optimizer does not directly compare HEX plans and old engine plans because HEX offers wider functionality and generally performs better with lower memory consumption. However, there may be cases where HEX shows worse performance.

  • 2847700 - How-to: Circumventing the HEX Engine in Specific Cases
  • 3326981 - Why HEX Plans fallback to old engines such as Join, OLAP, ESX

Which other documents belongs to hints?

  • 2700051 - Delivery of SAP HANA Statement Hints
  • 3079964 - When to apply hints and why are they needed (internal)
  • 3556465 - How to apply hint on statement level in SAP HANA?
  • 2509161 - Set SQL Execution Hints in the Graphical Calculation View on the Model Level
  • 3019087 - How to Apply HINTS / Calculation Engine Settings for Queries Against Calculation Views

Which other documents belongs to plans?

  • 2222321 - How-To: Pinning SAP HANA SQL Plans

Other articles in this series

✍️ Collected information about memory in context of SAP HANA
✍️ Collected information regarding partitioning in SAP HANA (with examples)
✍️ Collected information regarding High Availability and Disaster Recovery in SAP HANA
✍️ Collected information about reclaim / shrink / defragmentation topic in context of SAP HANA persiste...

Other articles in connected series

✍️ Where can I find knowledge and information belongs to SAP HANA?
✍️ Where can I find information about the available tools for SAP HANA (all types of use)?

Useful bookmark

🔖 2872774 – Bookmark of Frequently Asked Questions for SAP HANA
🔖 3311408 – Bookmark of SQL Statement Collection reports for SAP HANA
🔖 2658020 – List of SAP HANA SQL Error Codes

Release Information

Release DateDescription
2025.06.11First/initial Release of the SAP Blog Post documentation (Technical Article).

entry.title: Re: Calendar View functionality is missing on New integra...

entry.title: Define Planning Levels for Bank Statements EoD not visible
entry.content:
Hello!

In the CBC activity Define Planning Levels for Bank Statement EoD Bank statement is not visible, only Intraday. Why is that?

 

In the Test script J78 the steps mention to set Default Planning Level for EoD Bank Statements: for example, AB.

But EoD is not visible.

Test script: 

Why is that? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Incorrect delivery status "complete" after partial de...

Hi @SukhbirChhina1 

You followed me via DM to help you and I gave the solution.  Either close this discussion by Accepting the Right Answer or update here still what issue you face.

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting value should be added in material price while doing GRN
entry.content: Thanks for the quick reply.

entry.title: Re: Setup: Only send payment advice via mail if supplier...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can make the settings in the configuration activity Set Up Payment Methods per Company Code for Payment Transactions (101044). In the Payment Advice Note Control (Pyt Adv. Control) section, specify "restricted to 4 rows" in the "Note to payee lines on the form" field,  and select the "Payment advice after ... lines" option for "Payment advice output according to no. of lines". 

 

Best regards,

Sharon

entry.title: Re: Perform Manual Reconciliation
entry.content: Hello Gabor, the reconciliation is only supported for non-posted bank statement flows. Once the bank statement is posted, the bank statement flows (source application BS) will be deleted and replaced by accounting flows (source application BSEGV).

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting value should be added in material price while doing GRN
entry.content: But can you pls guide me, how to set subcontracting charges as service item in PO? I have added first line with item category "L" with price 200 INR. But little confuse, how to add service item. Because in SAP S/4HANA public cloud, there is no "D" item category.

entry.title: Passed SAP Certified Associate - Managing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Projects Exam
entry.content: I'm happy to share that I’ve successfully passed the SAP Certified Associate - Managing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Projects exam. It was a challenging yet rewarding experience, and I’m excited to apply this knowledge in real-world projects. Grateful for the Passexam4sure learning journey!

entry.title: Re: Discover the Fresh New Design of SAP Help Portal
entry.content:
The design looks good and fits into the current design language. But one question remains open: will there be a dark mode? A  lot of other documentations, especially technical ones, have the option to switch between dark and light mode. Would be great to see something similar!

Thanks a lot for the update!

entry.title: Re: Reclassification with "Regroup Receivables / Payables"
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

If you're trying to reclassify Accounts Payable (40000000) to Accounts Payable for Fixed Assets (40500000) for reporting purposes, the "Regroup Receivables / Payables" tile is not ideal. That app is meant for automatically netting customer/vendor balances, not for reclassifying payables based on the type of purchase (like fixed assets).

Instead, you should use:

  • "Post General Journal Entries": Manually move the balance from 40000000 to 40500000 with a clear reference to the asset or invoice.
  • Or, if available, "Reclassify Payables and Receivables": Offers more control and is better suited for reporting reclassifications.

 

Before proceeding, make sure to:

  1. Double-check the payable is actually for a fixed asset (linked to an asset invoice or PO).
  2. Document the entry well for audit purposes.
  3. Plan to reverse it next period if it's just for month-end reporting.
  4. Align with accounting policy ; some countries require this, others don’t.

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: Perform Manual Reconciliation
entry.content: Hello Amy, can we summarize the flow somehow? First, there needs to be a bank statement created, but not posted? Then we would be able to see it in the 'Reconcile Cash Flow' app? Also, can you please expand BS (bank statement?) and BSEGV?.

entry.title: Re: Perform Manual Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hello Gabor, yes you can only reconcile non-posted bank statements with forecasted cash flows using this app. Check out the following topics for more information: 

End-of-Day Bank Statement Flows

End-of-Day Bank Statements in One Exposure from Operations | SAP Help Portal

Accounting Flows

Integration of Accounting Documents | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to download the DME tree
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using CBC, you can’t directly download the DME tree (tags) from configuration activity 100558. Unfortunately, the export option (like .xmt files) isn’t available in the cloud version due to restricted backend access.

 

What you can do :

  • View and edit the DME tree via the CBC activity, but there’s no download button.
  • Manually copy the structure (e.g., to Excel) if needed for documentation.
  • If you really need an export (e.g., for reuse in another tenant), you can raise a support ticket with SAP and ask for the DME tree to be exported.

Note: The "Manage DME Trees" app with export functions exists only in on-premise or private cloud, not in public cloud.

 

I hope this will help you answer your question.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Architecture Guide
entry.content: A Great Blog. Thank You

entry.title: Re: Transforming ABAP Pricing User Exits to Local Extensions for SAP Variant Configuration and Prici
entry.content: Prompt updated: The enhanced prompt ensures code conversion and takes care of database queries made on custom tables or tables replicated by default for the Pricing service

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition ( Custom CDS View)
entry.content:
Hi ,

 ABAP Extensibility 

I am creating a Custom Analytical query in S/4 HANA Public Cloud using
Standard CDS viewI_InventoryPriceByKeyDate & I_ML_Balance  passing Currency Role & Ledger .
One CDS View created with Currency Role = 30 & Ledger = 0L .
2nd  CDS View created with Currency Role = 31 & Ledger = 4G .
In 1st CDS View i am getting 4 records for one material which is correct as per data and
in 2nd CDS View i am getting 5 records for that material which is also correct .
But when i try to create a analytical cube i am getting 20 records for this, which is 4 x 5  that is wrong .
Based on this Analytical cube , i am creating a Analytical query which is getting some wrong data ,
I tried all possible ways to restrict the duplicate records in Analytical Cube level , but its not working .
I am trying to create a CDS View using RAP , but this std CDS View I_ML_Balance is not released for cloud development .
 
Is there any way to use this std CDS view I_ML_Balance in RAP(Eclipse) or any other options to expose this std CDS view as Released for Cloud Development .
 
Kindly help me in this .
 
Thanks,
Pradeep

entry.title: Validation rule for Asset Master Data
entry.content:
Hello, I want to create a validation rule for fixed asset master data. 

I have a field National Classification Code classified as Time-Independent Data. I want the field to be mandatory when creating fixed asset. 

However, this field does NOT appear in the validation fields menu... 

I am in SAP S4H Public Cloud. Do you know how it can be added? 
Can the displayed validation fields be modified in the Manage substitution/validation rules for Fixed asset accounting - master data? 

 

thank you

entry.title: Re: Discover the Fresh New Design of SAP Help Portal
entry.content: @AndréWeis  thanks for your feedback! At the bottom of the screen you can click on Accessibility & Sustainability to change your display settings, including switching to Evening Theme. Let us know if you have any further questions!

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Cloud Transport Management Service (CTMS) on SAP BTP for SAP Datasphere Tenants
entry.content:
Great blog Aniket.

Question: A client has a two-node landscape, i.e., a Q-tenant and a production tenant. Within the Q-tenant, there are separate spaces for DEV and QA. Can cTMS be configured to support both DEV and QA within a single tenant? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, base: An Overview of the base edition bundle
entry.content: how many business users we can have in base edition can you please share license information document?

entry.title: create custom tab with a singlenotehistorycomponent
entry.content:
Hi

I want to create a new tab in the Account Customer object
and it will contain the EC of SINGL NOTE HISTORY
in a similar way to the standard NOTE tab of the system

I created an EC
and added the standard SAP notes component to it
and I linked the EC to the customer object

But what happened was that a notes tab was created but without the option to add new notes or edit them

I can't do anything on my screen

Can you try to help me solve the problem

Do you have a blog to guide me through the steps for the process I requested

entry.title: Re: Data Upload Starter issue in SAC
entry.content:
@raviv7 

Within the On After Execute  event you should wrap your DA execution code within a IF block based on DataUploadExecutionResponseStatus = success. This way it will execute only when DA upload had a success message.

 

Hope this helps !!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Instance creation failed - abap trial
entry.content:
Hi @gaurav_setu,

the issue should be fixed in the meanwhile. Can you please try again?

sorry for the inconveniences.

Best Regards,
Paul

entry.title: Re: Promotion Functionality in SuccessFactors Compensation
entry.content:
Hi David,

After enabling Standard fields of Promotion such as Promotion, Promotion Effective Date, Promotion Guideline & Promotion Cash Flow Impact , I am not getting promote option in the worksheet. (Screenshot attached)

Can you please provide your inputs on the same.

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Cloud Transport Management Service (CTMS) on SAP BTP for SAP Datasphere Tenants
entry.content:
@cjfaurie_1616 Thanks for the question. 

CTMS can't be use within same tenant. So If you want to transfer the data within the same tenant,
a. you can either use CSN/JSON import export option which will transfer the metadata.

b. Or you can do a live sharing of tables/views, etc from one space to another. Note: Live Share will only have read access. It can we however use in data modelling. Live sharing is just a remote view of the existing data in your source space. So it will not work for QA to DEV transport layer options.

c. 3rd option would be Import/Export/Package option in transport layer within datasphere. But you need to take consideration the fact that space names cannot be same within same tenant. and while transferring the object, there could be a dependency on space name. 

Hope this helps.

Kind Regards,
Aniket Agrawal

entry.title: Re: Round business rule always going to 0
entry.content:
Hi @Katie ,

from Business Rules perspective your rule looks good. I double checked with configuring the same rule in our internal systems (but not on the OfferDetailTemplate, as in my system I do not have a field BaseCompensationAnnual) and it works as expected.

To check what happens with your number, I recommend to use the rule trace and check the values that are passed to the functions and the outcome. 

If the rule trace doesn't show any issue and the correct decimal number is the result of the rule, but the number in your field "OfferDetailTemplate.BaseCompensationAnnual still shows the zero decimals instead of the correct decimal numbers, it might be follow up logic in RCM. 

As I am not the expert on RCM, I leave it to the colleagues to answer that question. 

However, first step should be to check the values that are passed to the rule/rule functions via the rule trace and the result of the rule.

Hope this helps.

BR, Sylvia

entry.title: Re: Connection issue in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

what are the resources exposed in cloud connector? also check if you have added location ID while adding subaccount and select the location id in the connection within datasphere?

refer to https://me.sap.com/notes/0003260800

Thanks,

Shailendar

entry.title: Re: Total for GL accounts in SAC TB=B/S + I/S flat structure
entry.content:
@PB00SAP 

Either create some form of hierarchy or attribute to group the BS accounts and PL accounts. Formulas wont work on account ranges.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori "My Inbox - Approve Purchase Requisitions"...
entry.content:
I've had this exact same issue - I copied the standard Workflow template to a bespoke one in order to replace the standard tasks TS20000161 and TS20000162 with a bespoke email task.  The reason for doing this is because once the Approval decision has been made, a further dialog task was being sent to the users' inbox which then had to be actioned.  As the users weren't actioning these tasks there are now hundreds of Workflows that haven't yet ended.  Replacing these tasks with an email notification means that the Workflows complete immediately after the decision has been made.

The reason that the Approve / Reject buttons don't work with the bespoke Workflow template is because they're handled by an implementation of BADI definition /IWWRK/BADI_WF_BEFORE_UPD_IB.  The standard implementation is MM_PUR_REQ_APPROVE_ACTIONS, and includes Workflow template WS20000077 in the Filter values, and so in order for it to work with the bespoke Workflow template this also needs to be added to the Filter values.  Or if you don't want to create a repair and have the subsequent SPAU adjustments to worry about, just create a new bespoke BADI implementation that has the required filter values and implements the standard class CL_MM_PUR_REQ_APPR_ACTION_BADI.

Hope this helps someone!

entry.title: Re: How to hide navigation arrow on table in Fiori Elemen...
entry.content:
in manifest

"navigation" : "none"

you can write.

entry.content:
Hi @hk-123 ,

As this is a change/improvement to the product, you must use SAP's official channel to request it: http://influence.sap.com

Take some time to read the documentation in this regard: SAP Help 

*** Please, if this answer resolves or provides direction for your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This assists our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Ми повернулись! Нові безкоштовні SAP-вебінари
entry.content:
Продовжуємо серію навчальних сесій!👊🏻

Ми повертаємося з новою хвилею безкоштовних вебінарів від експертів SAP! Тепер ще більше актуальних тем - від цифрової трансформації до агентного штучного інтелекту.

Третій тиждень червня (18-19):

18 червня | Цифрова трансформація (дві сесії)

"Unlocking Success in Digital Transformation: SAP Integrated Toolchain"
⏰08:00-08:45 або 14:00-14:45

Покроковий підхід до впровадження clean core.

Посилання на ранковий вебінар та на обідній.

18-19 червня. Управління кейсами

"Case Management" - навчання роботі з Get Support додатком
⏰18.06 (11:30-12:30) або 19.06 (15:00-16:00)

Перший та другий день.

Четвертий тиждень червня (24-26):

24 червня | ШІ та автоматизація (дві сесії!)

"SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition FPS03 Highlights"
⏰08:00-08:45 або 14:00-14:45
Найновіші AI, автоматизація та покращення юзабіліті

Вебінар 1 & вебінар 2 

24 червня | Бізнес-аналітика

"Accelerate Insights with SAP Business Data Cloud"
⏰11:00-11:30
Живе демо інтелігентних додатків від фінансів до HR

24 червня | Архітектурна конвергенція

"Enterprise Architecture Convergence: AI-First and Suite-First Strategy"
⏰14:00-15:00
Оркестрація AI-можливостей з Suite-First принципами

24 червня | Data Engineering

"Scale Data and AI Engineering: SAP Business Data Cloud and SAP Databricks"
⏰15:00-16:00
Масштабування даних та ML-інженерії

24 червня | Інтеграції

"SAP Integration Suite Monthly Update June"
⏰16:00-17:00

25 червня | Безпека праці

"Protect workers with AI-powered SAP EHS Workplace Safety"
⏰16:00-17:00
ШІ-рішення для безпечного робочого місця

25 червня | SAP for Me

"Introduction to SAP for Me and the Get Support Application"
⏰17:00-18:00

26 червня | Агентний ШІ

"Expert Demo Session -- Agentic AI in Action"
⏰11:00-12:00
Демо агентного ШІ в SAP Cloud ERP Private

26 червня | Безпека

"Secure Configuration for your SAP BTP Services"
⏰15:00-16:00
Огляд рекомендацій SAP Security

Липень 2025 

1 липня | Clean Core

"Realizing Clean Core using Cloud Extensibility"
⏰14:00-15:00
Стратегічний підхід до підтримки чистого ядра систем

1 липня | Joule Studio

"Meet Joule Studio: Drive Innovation with AI Agents & Joule Skills"
⏰15:00-16:00
Створення складних AI-агентів для трансформації бізнес-процесів

2 липня | Сталі закупівлі

"SAP-Powered Sustainable Procurement"
⏰16:00-17:00
ERP-центричне рішення для управління закупівлями

3 липня | Демократизація даних

"Data Democratization Strategy Update"
⏰15:00-16:00
Як SAP залучає користувачів через SAP Datasphere та Collibra

📚Корисні ресурси та новини:

SAP Enterprise Support Academy:

  • Серія імплементації SAP Business Data Cloud - експертні керівництва
  • 6 ШІ-методів трансформації підтримки клієнтів SAP - стаття від EVP Stefan Steinle
  • Перегляд запису: розуміння формату Expert-Guided Implementation (EGI)
  • Новий звіт Support Insights в SAP for Me - миттєва видимість статусу рішень
  • Перевірка використання SAP - порівняння з галузевими колегами

🛒Додаткові матеріали:

  • ШІ розширює можливості шопінгу - покращення клієнтського досвіду
  • Успішний go-live з SAP Cloud Integration - сервіс CQC для моніторингу продуктивності
 
🔗Як приєднатися:

Кожен вебінар має індивідуальне посилання для реєстрації. Деякі сесії транслюються наживо з можливістю перегляду запису.

Трансформуйте свої знання на вебінарах!

 

#SAPCommunityKyiv #Webinars #DigitalTransformation #AI #CloudERP #EnterpriseArchitecture #Sustainability #JouleStudio

entry.title: Re: SSO Live Connection from SAC to HANA using CIS gettin...
entry.content:
Hi,

Does SAC has SAML SSO enabled? if yes the userprinciple ID is same between SAC and HANA SAML SSO? if it is not then that might be the issue..

that error occurs when SAML SSO fails.. 

The "StatusCode in ResponseMessage != OK" error in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) during HANA SAML SSO setup typically indicates a mismatch or problem during the SAML authentication flow between SAC and the HANA database, often involving the Identity Provider (IdP). It could be a problem with the IdP configuration, a user verification issue, or a mismatch in SAML attributes or encryption. 

refer to https://me.sap.com/notes/0002850347 

Thanks,

Shailendar.

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Travel Expenses in SAP S/4HANA On-Pr...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

 

you might check section  'implementation information' in SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library

for the app 'My Travel and Expenses for Business Traveler'.

 

Regards,

Monika

entry.title: Re: Exploring SAP Joule Integration Options with SAP Data...
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently the Early Adapter Care program is going on for Joule in Datasphere: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/become-an-early-adopter-for-joule-in-sap-datasphere/ba-p/14096474 

Joule in SAC is in Roadmap for this year in H2.

Joule integration with other solutions, refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/JOULE/6189c8655c484916bb8eb767126a653a/3b797193d7694d7492ca1203c2b21dee.html 

Thanks,

Shailendar.

entry.title: Re: My Introduction
entry.content:
Hey Souravraj welcome! happy to have you in the SAP Community ^^

You can check the location groups out and find the one closer to you and learn while making cool connections. You can also follow the topics that you find helpful on the managed tags page.

Have fun :))

entry.title: Orchestration with Grounding Capabilities in SAP AI Core - Internal server error
entry.content:
Hi Community 

im executing the tutorial Orchestration with Grounding Capabilities in SAP AI Core | SAP Tutorials

but in step 5/ 4. Create generic secret I'm getting internal server error, do you face similar issues? any tips?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Rehire scenario with EC mini master

entry.title: Re: Technical Error in PCC
entry.content: what is the beginning error, it ll give more information or check the ST22 error for more details

entry.title: Reigniting Purpose Through SAP Certification
entry.content:
Yasir Sheikh, an SAP Project Manager based in Dubai, has spent more than two decades leading ERP transformations across global firms like IBM, PwC, Deloitte, BearingPoint, and EY. With a career dedicated to bridging business and IT, Yasir has always been passionate about delivering high-impact ERP transformations — and equally committed to continuously upskilling himself along the way. “What drives me most is creating real value for clients while continuously upskilling myself.”

Staying Ahead

In his current role, Yasir leads implementations of SAP Fieldglass and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, managing teams and aligning delivery with clients across regions. “My typical day involves managing project teams, aligning delivery plans with clients, resolving cross-functional issues, and ensuring that SAP solutions are implemented effectively and on time.” Right now, he’s leading a multi-country SAP Fieldglass solution implementation project for a financial institution in the UAE, from planning to post-go-live support.

With cloud adoption accelerating, Yasir saw the need to deepen his knowledge, even after 22 years in the field. He chose the Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public Edition) Certification to align his hands-on expertise with the latest innovations, and to strengthen his ability to meet client expectations in a cloud-first world. “Although I had extensive experience managing SAP projects, I wanted to update my knowledge to match SAP’s evolving cloud-first strategy,” he explained. “I also wanted to show that at 49, it’s never too late to reinvest in your skills — a message I hope can inspire others in the industry.”

Learning That Connects Directly to Work

Learning something new while managing live client projects wasn’t easy. But Yasir embraced the challenge. “Balancing active client delivery with late-night study sessions required discipline, but the structure of the free SAP Learning site and the relevance of the learning content made it easier to stay motivated.” The learning paid off immediately — not just in knowledge, but in practical application.

“One of the most energizing aspects was applying new knowledge immediately in my real-world projects, for example connecting cloud configuration concepts to actual client discussions.”

New Projects, New Purpose

Completing the certification exam brought both professional and personal rewards. It enhanced Yasir’s credibility with clients, created new career opportunities, and reminded him of why he loves what he does. “It gave me a renewed sense of professional purpose, and reaffirmed my belief that learning is a lifelong journey,” he shares. "It also sparked a desire to give back, to contribute more to the SAP community, and mentor younger professionals."

At this stage of his career, Yasir sees continued learning as essential — not just for growth, but for relevance. “Staying relevant, sharing knowledge, and proving that learning has no age barrier are most important to me.”

Are you ready to begin your SAP journey?  Explore the SAP Learning site and take the first step to transform your future.

entry.title: Where does SAP Datasphere store the business names of columns for SQL access?

Where does SAP Datasphere store the texts for the business names exactly? I found several views that looked promising but none of them contained the business names:

If anybody knows more, please let me know!

Thanks, Alexander.

entry.title: Re: No certification even after a week of exam and support ticket
entry.content: 3 weeks now. No certification yet. Having tried multiple options (including email to e-learning) any other recommendations to escalate this further. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: 🚛 Migration vs. ⬆️ Upgrade: Understanding the SAP Essentials (With Real‑World Clarity!)
entry.content:
Ever heard someone say "We're upgrading to S/4HANA" when they really meant “migrating” to HANA? You’re not alone—these terms are often misunderstood, but knowing the difference is critical 💡. 

Whether you're a consultant, a technical architect, or part of a functional team, or Business users understanding the difference is crucial for planning, execution, and business alignment. Knowing the difference between migration and upgradation can help you communicate better, plan smarter, and execute projects more efficiently.

 

🏗️ Migration = Moving House

You're shifting your entire SAP landscape—platform, database, and deployment environment.
Common Scenarios:

  • On‑Prem Oracle → SAP HANA

  • On‑Prem → Cloud

  • Legacy ERP → S/4HANA (Greenfield)

Tools: SAP Migration Cockpit, DMO, LSMW, Data Services
Focus: Data quality, performance, scalability

🛠️ Upgrade = Renovation

Same house, but with brand‑new features and updates.
Typical Use‑Cases:

  • ECC 6.0 EHP5 → EHP8

  • NetWeaver, GUI → Fiori UX

  • ECC → S/4HANA via Brownfield

Tools: SUM, Maintenance Planner, SPAM/SAINT
Focus: Functionality, user experience, compliance

🔍 Quick Comparison

Factor Migration Upgrade
GoalNew platformNew version
Change TypeTech + functionalFunctional only
Data HandlingETL / cleansed loadRetain existing data
Risk LevelHigherLower
When to Choose?DB switch, greenfieldNew features, UX, support
 

🎯 Which One Do You Need?

  • Migration = Changing where or how your SAP runs

  • Upgrade = Improving what’s already there

👉 Why It Matters

  • Align teams: set clear technical vs. business objectives

  • Optimize planning: scope, budget, risk & tool choice

  • Improve communication: speak the same language across IT & business

📣 From the SAP Community

Have you tackled a migration or upgrade?

  • What was your biggest challenge—data cleanup, downtime, custom code?

  • Any tools or tips you swear by?

Drop your insights below—let’s build a resource together! 👇

📲 Let's Connect

Follow me for more SAP & S/4HANA insights, and reach out if you want to dive deeper!
LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/mirza-hasan-051369231

entry.title: Despite creation of a spatial record via the API, service region is not visible on Service Map
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I am setting up Service Regions in order to make them appear visually on the Service Map, as described in the following SAP Help Documentation: Field Service Management - Planning and Dispatching - Regions

I have created several regions:

I can their internal id via a CoreSQL query:

I have used Postman to create a Spatial Record, as described in the following SAP Help Documentation: Field Service Management - FSM Spatial Data API - Create Spatial Record. I used exactly the same body as in the documentation, only changing the id of the region. I got a 201 response - created:

So far so good, but when I go to the Service Map, I cannot see the "Eye" icon which is visible on  this picture, which is coming from the official SAP documentation. 

 

I am using Google Maps as Map Provider. 

Have anyone experienced this issue ? Am I missing a configuration step ? 

Thank you for your help !

entry.title: Time sheet working time and absence time are colliding but no admin alert
entry.content:
HI All , 

Noticed this weird behavior for time sheet and absence where following sequence of event has happened.

Employee was in 7-16:30 shift on 24th Jun 2024. 

Applied for half day leave - 13:00 - 16:30 leave created. 

Working time came from biometric on 25th June for 24th June for 5:52- 13:00

On 8th July 2024 - One of the admin assigned Back dated Temporary working schedule  for 6:00- 15:30. 

Time alert generated that absence is falling out of planned time which makes sense. 

13th Jan 2025 - Admin adjusted the absence within planned time somehow. Not sure how but they were able to save 10:00 - 15:30 based on temp. work schedule half day.  which dissolved the timealert.

Suddenly in may , the timesheet is recalculated for backdate and alert is clear for absence. but on UI THIS BELOW ERROR APPEARS ON UI. -

No other alert is generated for ADMIN . How can we track such errors if these are only appearing on UI.

How one can ensure collision on absence and attendance are tracked ?

Is this a product gap or limitation or bug ?

entry.title: Re: In sourcing and procurement, Output determination for...
entry.content: No, not in scope. Check note 3473147.

entry.title: Re: Practice-systems/basic-abap-programming NOT FOUND (404)
entry.content:
Hi @kendel @Jessica45 

If you run into issue during enrollment or practice in the learning system please create a new case ticketing system 
Please make sure to select "Practice Systems" as the “Service Category” and kindly fill out the appropriate form.
When raising an inquiry, include detailed information in the description to help our team assist you better.
Please also check our Practice systems support where you find a list of general questions and answers on practice systems, all designed to help you to resolve issues may encounter on SAP Learning.

Kind regards
Margit

 

Kind regards

Margit

entry.title: Re: Getting 403 forbidden when trying to return with cart...
entry.content: @rajeshps The transaction for the service is SICF. The HOOK_URL value has to be configured in the call structure of the catalog, with the correct Fiori server name and port. This will be used to return to the Fiori app from the external catalog.

2442595 - Error:"The object you are trying to promote may be available in the Recycle Bin. Delete the object from the Recycle Bin and try again" when promoting object | SAP Knowledge Base Article

but it didn't help.

I'm working on SAP BusinessObjects BI 4.3 Support Pack 2 Patch 12.

Thank you so much in advance for your help.

Francesco

entry.title: How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dears,

As it is in subject - How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud ?

For purpose:

Persons on B2B contract - they can't see each other's invoices in Supplier Invoice List app. 

Both person will be in the same Company Code, in the same Purchasing Group. Only difference will be in Cost Center.

How can we avoid this kind of situations ? 

Which attribute can limit this?

Regards

Can anyone help out with this.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Treating Business Goals as "Individual" Goals possible?
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec , 

in the end there are only 2 values for each employee that need to be calculated with / or against the target amount. 

Lets say the target percentage is 10% (which is valid for all employees that are eligible) I need to divide it into 2 parts. 

a) "Billable Hours" part

The billable hours can be retrieved from CompInfo where are 2 seperate fields available. I described the calculation for that in my last answer.

b) "Individual Goal" part

Needs to be the second part of the calculation

 

Now it might get tricky:

W for weightage ) The tricky thing is that the weightage between a) and b) was determined at the end of last cycle and needs to be taken into consideration. Is there a way to determine the weightage of the sections on an employee level for example

Employee A with a) 30% and b) 70%

Employee B with a) 75% and b) 25%

?

Thank you!

(P.S.: as you can see, i don't have a lot of experience and i have to admit, my certification was some time ago, I obviously need some guidance ...)

entry.title: How to filter in the trash in Manager ?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Can you please help me out with how to filter in the trash in Manager? I can see the items that were deleted appearing there but I cant filter because it's by chronological order and not alphabetical. 

I tried adding a custom filter but the filtering is only within "Task filters" that we havent used for every object that has been deleted. There is no "view deleted items" status or "deleted" status so there is no way I can filter within the trash.

Additionally some resources have been deleted and are polluting the trash as well and there is no way to restore them and clicking on "revert resources" doesnt make it disappear and most of the time I get an error message.

Appreciate the help!!

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders （6VW)
entry.content:
Hi @Li_Grace 

I got it. From your screenshot, the error is related to the Item Category field being blank in the Excel template for Purchase Order upload (most likely using Mass Upload in S/4HANA Public Cloud).

Even though the system may default the item category for a standard PO item (typically, "blank" means standard), the template expects an explicit entry or recognises it incorrectly when left blank.

What to do:

  • In your Excel template under Item Category, input a space character (" ") or leave it empty without any formatting or hidden characters.
  • If that still fails, explicitly enter 0 or blank (depends on system version, but in many Public Cloud tenants, 0 = standard).
  • Alternatively, try entering "Standard" or use dropdown values, if available, to match system expectations.

Check the Fiori app or documentation tied to your PO upload template , sometimes the expected values are not truly blank but require a code like "0" or "standard".

If it still fails, feel free to share the full error message pop-up or line comment from the upload log,I can pinpoint exactly what’s failing.

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Changing User Status With STATUS_CHANGE_EXTERN
entry.content: Do you know which specific Business Transaction need to be define?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW InfoObject 0DEB_CRE_LC with +/- sign ?
entry.content:
Hi Charlie

if i remember correctly the SIGN flag in infobject maintenance refers to BEX query data display. In the dso you will see the signs of every record. 

hope it helps

entry.title: Re: Validation rule for Asset Master Data
entry.content:
Hi @JAS3311 

Not sure about Public Cloud but in On Premise and Private cloud SAP GUI, you can add missing fields through transaction code SM30 and enter Table - VWTYGB01 

Check for the relevant Table and Field and deactivate the “Exclude” checkbox, and SAVE the setting. You can add your field if its not available.

After that Run program RGUGBR00 in SE38

Check if same can be done through any views in SAP Public cloud.

Please check and confirm

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: Joule for ABAP-Developers: An unexpected error occured
entry.content:
Hi there,

since several days Joule for ABAP development stopped to work on all of our BTP ABAP instances (paid and free tier). 

When chatting with Joule, the following error appears in the Joule view of Eclipse:

When trying to generate unit tests, Joule responds initially, but then refuses to generate the tests:

Also the chat when generating a transactional RAP business object fails:

However, the AI powered code suggestions works as usual. 

Eclipse and ABAP development tools are on the latest release version.

Does anybody experience the same issues? How to fix this?

Thank you & BR
Stefan

entry.title: error 314 numeric overflow for table containing value 1.0
entry.content:
Dear experts,
When I try to run a dataflow, I get the error below. Could you guide me on how to solve the issue ? 

Group messages:
Group: default; Messages: Graph failure: target1 failed with the following error:
General error;314 numeric overflow: Failed in "CaseSensitiveSbCharf" column with the value 1.000000000000000000
Process(es) terminated with error(s). restartOnFailure==false

In the data flow I want to run, data source contains "1.0" in the column (instead of "1.000000000000000000") and then converted to the local table in the target after projection. (Screenshot attached). I also attach the screenshot of the data integration monitor. 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Uploading Attachments’ – Attach any File (PDF/DOC/JPG/XLS/TXT..) through the OData
entry.content: Excellent Blog! The entire block of code is working without any error.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio: How to Convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (String) to yyyy-mm-dd hh:mm:ss (Timestamp)
entry.content:
Hi,

without checking out your data set, I am assuming "OH"."createddate" has the value 'Y' in at least one case and not the value '[Y]' which you are filtering in line 4. Maybe check your data set and adjust your code in line 4 accordingly.

Further line 4 could be replaced with something more generic like:

WHEN NOT("OH"."createddate" LIKE '____-__-__T__:__:__%') THEN NULL

Hope this helps.

Best,

Benedict

entry.title: Re: Pro-rate salaried teammates wages
entry.content: I would like the proration to feed off of 5 days rather than a 7 day week
